ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Continued To Jan-05-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Torreano.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiffs: Ernest Kagramonov, Speck Cab Company dba Arrow Cab Company.
Plaintiff's witness: Bonnie Barberini, was sworn and examined.
After hearing testimony of witness and the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant: Martin Mungwa, as follows:
Damages $5,157.07
Costs $519.30, for a total of $5,676.37
Judgment signed in open court.
